title: Accessible Toolbar

statement.markdown:
**Accessible Toolbar Challenge**
===

In this challenge, you will implement an accessible toolbar that adheres to Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 standards. The toolbar should have the following features:
### Requirements
1. Provide a way for users to navigate the toolbar using only a keyboard.
2. Ensure that all interactive elements (e.g., buttons, dropdown menus) are accessible via keyboard-only navigation.
3. Use ARIA attributes to provide a better experience for screen readers.
4. Make sure the toolbar is responsive and works well on various screen sizes.

constraints: Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the implementation.
Utilize Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The toolbar should be fully functional without any JavaScript, except for keyboard navigation functionality.
Implement a dropdown menu with at least 5 options.
The dropdown menu should be hidden by default and displayed only when a button is clicked.
